behavior_summary: U8P_STATUET::look is the object's examine/U8P_STATUET::look handler; when the player examines the statuette it displays a single short text/bark 'statuette'.
After showing the bark the process suspends, ending the U8P_STATUET::look interaction with no further side effects.
The handler is stateless: it does not read or write global flags, call external systems, or present menus or branching logic.

No conditional branches, no menu/Ask nodes, and no external or internal calls observed.
